acceptance_targets: [chapter_12_prose_01] PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:121, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:221 contain no more than two inferential "as if"/"like" comparison scaffolds total, and at least four of those beats land as direct description or action; FAIL if the same sentence pattern still repeats through the caregiving and dawn setup.

[chapter_12_prose_02] PASS if every sentence in the revised cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:104 contains an explicit verb while the fever pressure remains legible on the page; FAIL if any standalone image fragment without a governing verb remains in that passage.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:121, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:221 contain no more than two inferential "as if"/"like" comparison scaffolds total, and at least four of those beats land as direct description or action; FAIL if the same sentence pattern still repeats through the caregiving and dawn setup.
findings.problem: The prose leans on the same inferential comparison scaffold far past the twice-is-coincidence threshold: key descriptive beats keep arriving through repeated "as if" and "like" turns, so sentence texture starts to feel mechanically familiar instead of freshly pressured.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the repeated comparison beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:121, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:221. Keep only the strongest one or two similes; convert the rest into direct sensory fact, plain physical action, or Nami's blunt judgment so the prose stops explaining pressure through the same comparison shape.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if every sentence in the revised cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:104 contains an explicit verb while the fever pressure remains legible on the page; FAIL if any standalone image fragment without a governing verb remains in that passage.
findings.problem: The fever-dream cluster drops into verbless image fragments ("Jun's drowned infant face..." / "Sereya's ferry pole...") that read as clipped lyric shorthand. That violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration and weakens what should be fully rendered fever perception.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the dream sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_12.md:104 into grammatically complete clauses anchored to Nami's body and perception. Keep the dream logic, but give each image an explicit action or state instead of presenting it as a standalone noun-phrase fragment.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
